_meta.source: Composite: WFP HungerMap + IPC + ACLED + FAO FFPI + ReliefWeb + Open-Meteo (weather/flood) + NASA FIRMS + OpenAQ + USGS Water + WFP per-country (FX/inflation) + Eurostat food HICP + FAOSTAT food CPI + INFORM risk + WB WGI rule of law + USDA PSD staples shortfall
_meta.notes: Adjustment range -10 to +35 added to structural FDRS to produce nowcast score. See methodology page for component formula.
